zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Payen I - Count of Gisfors於1136年之前出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯時，他的父親Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar65歲，母親Catherine De Sinclair26歲。他於大約1164年與Lady Elizabeth De Thomas在英國英格蘭賀福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1189年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Payen I - Count of Gisfors于1136年之前出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯时，他的父亲Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar65岁，母亲Catherine De Sinclair26岁。他于大约1164年与Lady Elizabeth De Thomas在英国英格兰賀福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1189年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Payen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from the Old French personal name Pagen, Paien, from Latin Paganus, from paganus ‘country-dweller’, a derivative of pagus ‘of or relating to the countryside’, possibly given to a child not yet baptized (because of its later sense of ‘pagan, heathen’). Alternatively, a nickname for a country-born person. This surname is also found in the West Indies (mainly Haiti) and Mauritius.

variants.name: Payan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Ramon, Carlos, Jesus, Leticia, Luis, Ana, Cruz, Juana, Roberto, Rodolfo.
Spanish (Payán): perhaps from Mozarab päiên ‘cave, ravine’, from Hispanic Latin pedia, derived from pedem ‘foot’. In Spain, this surname is found mainly in Andalusia.

variants.name: Pesnell
meanings: Probably an altered form of French (Normandy) Pesnel: from a vernacular pet form of the old personal name Payen , or a topographic name for someone who lived by a fence or palissade, from a shortened form of paissenel, pessenel, a diminutive of paisson, pesson ‘post, stake’. This surname was brought to North America from England.

variants.name: Pean
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Georges, Michel, Colette, Fabienne, Herve, Jacques, Maryse, Pierre.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Payen I - Count of Gisfors was born before 1136, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, his father, Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar, was 65 and his mother, Catherine De Sinclair, was 26. He married Lady Elizabeth De Thomas about 1164, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1189, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Payen I - Count of Gisfors est né avant 1136, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Catherine De Sinclair, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth De Thomas environ 1164, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1189, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Payen I - Count of Gisfors è nato il prima del 1136 nel Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar, aveva 65 anni e il suo madre, Catherine De Sinclair, aveva 26 anni. Morì nel 1189, nel Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Payen I - Count of Gisforsが1136年以前にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで生まれた時，父Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templarは65歳，母Catherine De Sinclairは26歳であった。約1164年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでLady Elizabeth De Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1189年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Payen I - Count of Gisfors(이)가 1136년 이전 영국 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar(은)는 65세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine De Sinclair(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1164년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 Lady Elizabeth De Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1189년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Payen I - Count of Gisfors родился перед 1136 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugues II de Payens 1st Grand Master of the Knights Templar было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine De Sinclair, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth De Thomas около 1164 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1189 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
